data.title: Musk's AI Chatbot Grok Gains Traction in U.S. Federal Government
data.description: According to BlockBeats, three informed sources have revealed that Elon Musk's DOGE team is expanding the use of his AI chatbot, Grok, within the U.S. federal government. The team is reportedly utilizing a customized version of the Grok chatbot to analyze data.

data.title: Changpeng Zhao responded to the WSJ report, calling it "deliberate fabrication and non-journalistic behavior"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance founder Zhao Changpeng (CZ) responded to the recent report of the Wall Street Journal on his participation in the World Liberty Financial project on the X platform, saying that it was not a real interview, but a "malicious fabrication under the guise of asking questions", questioning whether it has become a "mouthpiece for negative narratives". Zhao Changpeng quoted the "Cunningham Law" and pointed out that the WSJ violated the professional spirit of journalism by constructing a false narrative to induce clarification. He emphasized that the inquiries submitted by the WSJ in advance were full of "errors and negative assumptions", such as accusing it of "matchmaking" for the WLF team and arranging a meeting with Pakistani official Saqib, while the fact was that he met Saqib for the first time in Pakistan and had never been involved in any international itinerary of WLF. He bluntly said, "When the report starts from a negative standpoint, the so-called 'error correction' is meaningless because the whole story itself is fictional." He also believed that the incident reflected "some forces in the United States attempting to suppress the development of the encryption industry, targeting global encryption leaders and government positions that support encryption."

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/23/jpmorgan-chase-bank-of-america-citibank-and-wells-fargos-total-assets-balloon-by-681710000000-in-just-three-months-sp-global/

data.title: Zhu Su crypto platform OX.FUN reaches cooperation with ORA, with an annualized mining yield of 2000%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Zhu Su, the former co-founder of Three Arrows Capital, announced that his crypto trading platform OX.FUN has reached a strategic cooperation with ORA and officially joined the ORA Web (3,3) smart network ecosystem.
OX/ORA dual-currency Axon has been officially launched. As an LP, you can get ORA mining incentives by providing liquidity. Zhu Su posted on the X platform that due to ORA incentives, the current OX/ORA annualized rate of return (Apy) has reached 2000%.
Driven by the news of the cooperation, ORA rose 13.3% intraday and is now at $0.76. At the same time, OX holders will receive ORA rewards in the future, further binding the ecosystem for common growth.

data.title: A certain address spent $449,000 to buy 826,000 SOON, becoming the top individual SOON holder
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, an address spent $449,000 to buy 826,000 SOON in the past 50 minutes, with an average price of $0.5436, becoming the top individual SOON holder. 
He has currently transferred 700,000 of the tokens to other addresses, and has not taken any other actions.

data.title: SafeMoon Scandal Explodes: CEO Karony Convicted in $9M Crypto Fraud
data.description:
The SafeMoon scandal has escalated dramatically, as the company's CEO, John Karony, has been convicted of orchestrating a cryptocurrency fraud scheme that resulted in losses amounting to an astounding $9 million. This shocking development has sent ripples through the crypto community, raising questions about the integrity of the project and the future of its investors.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/news/safemoon-scam-ex-ceo-faces-45-years

data.title: Japanese bonds recover slightly after record slump as unrealized losses surge
data.description:
Japanese government bonds edged up slightly on Friday, clawing back ground after a brutal week that saw yields on long-term debt hit historic highs. The rebound followed five straight days of selloffs, driven by inflation concerns, weak investor appetite, and rising anxiety over Japan’s ballooning fiscal deficit. According to Reuters, the chaos in the bond […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-bonds-recover-slightly-record-slump/
